top_signals.title: China Chip Stocks Jump on Hopes for Huawei Tech | The China Show 5/26/2026
top_signals.summary: “Bloomberg: The China Show” is your definitive source for news and analysis on the world's second-biggest economy. From politics and policy to tech and trends, Yvonne Man and Avril Hong give global investors unique insight, delivering in-depth discussions with the newsmakers who matter. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Microsoft’s new responsible tech lead on how to humanize high-speed AI development
top_signals.summary: Jenny Lay-Flurrie, head of Microsoft's Trusted Technology Group, says responsible tech is: How do we build it right? And how do we keep it that way?
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
